title: Daily 5 Tracker
description: A simple daily activity tracker for five useful Partner actions per day.
reviewQuestions: Were five useful Partner actions completed today?
Which conversations need follow-up?
Which asset was shared most often?
What is the next action for each open conversation?

title: Partner Weekly Review Template
description: A weekly review template for summarizing Partner activity, referral conversations, follow-up, and next actions.
reviewQuestions: What useful actions were completed this week?
Which referral sources need follow-up?
Which opportunities are stuck?
What should be improved next week?

title: Referral Partner Outreach Tracker
description: A tracker for managing outreach to bank managers, accountants, attorneys, equipment dealers, trucking contacts, construction contacts, and local connectors.
reviewQuestions: Which referral lanes are getting traction?
Which referral sources need a second touch?
Which assets are helping conversations?
Which contacts should be paused or deprioritized?

title: Business Owner Conversation Tracker
description: A tracker for capturing business owner conversation context, possible needs, next steps, and follow-up.
reviewQuestions: What business problem was discussed?
What additional information is needed?
Was the next step framed safely?
Is follow-up scheduled?

title: Application Follow-Up Tracker
description: A tracker for application-related follow-up, documentation status, and next actions without implying approval or funding outcomes.
reviewQuestions: What information is still needed?
Has the business owner been updated accurately?
Is the next action clear?
Does the status avoid implying a guaranteed approval?

title: Asset Usage Tracker
description: A tracker for logging which scripts, handouts, prompts, trackers, and launch kit assets are being used.
reviewQuestions: Which assets are being used most often?
Which assets need revision?
Which referral lane needs better support?
Are any assets using unsafe language?

title: Launch Kit Progress Tracker
description: A tracker for monitoring progress on Partner launch kits, source paths, assets, safe language, and review status.
reviewQuestions: Is the Partner overview complete?
Are the strongest lanes mapped?
Are available assets linked?
Has the safe language been reviewed?
What is the next launch action?
